en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 9

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 9
Top Question of the Week
How is DIGITALAX expanding and reinforcing its community?

The DIGITALAX ecosystem is made up of designers, creators, artists, modders, developers, technologists, web3/crypto enthusiasts, and other metaversal dwellers. Our undertaking is bigger than any individual member, the collective alignment of the community for the greater pursuit of building open web3 native digital fashion and metaverse ready infrastructure is at the heart of this project.

As we continue to scale up, further advance and build out more parts of our operating system, the on-ramps and access channels that we are able to support and establish too increases. And, this is where it gets exciting. We are progressively decentralising our entire ecosystem overtime, where eventually each community member will have an active and tangible stake in not only the direction and governance of the project, but, even more than that, have the ability to spin up personal decentralised realms that can bring themselves direct value and also contribute back to the broader ecosystem— a symbiotic give and take.

As an immediate next step towards this, we have started reinforcing more of our designer ecosystem through our Fractional Garment Ownership standard and growing out our on-chain open source 1155 libraries of materials, patterns and textures. There is much to come from this and some really exciting big announcements being released soon! If you are a designer, creator, artist… anyone with a desire to enter the metaverse, and you align with our mission, then please reach out so we can get you onboarded! You can also read more here.

Unlike many projects, both in crypto and especially web2, DIGITALAX is not building for an exit. We are here for the long haul. And, putting aside the tremendous progress we have made so far, there is still much more progress to be made… we can’t wait! Well… more accurately… we won’t wait!
Most Common Repeat Questions
When is the PODE V2 release?

PODE V2, and any updates surrounding it, will be announced across all DIGITALAX official channels. Our priority is to deliver a high quality set of experiences, within a broader framework that can grow sustainably throughout the lifetime of the community, created entirely in house, developed properly with the time and resources that it takes, and delivering recurring value for those who choose actively to participate in a healthy ecosystem. PODE V2 is an exit path, where none previously existed, in direct response to those who don’t align with this roadmap and have called for a way out. We take our treasury allocation and management seriously and are making sure that all resources put in to this PODE V2 initiative, as outlined here , deliver lucrativeness to those that align— in order to ensure this, we are allocating the time and resources that it takes.
Top Controversies in the Industry

I must admit, it has been both enlightening and also incredibly entertaining following ROBNESS’s #FUCKPUNKS insurgency. And, yes, some tweets are funny trolls riddled with sarcasm, but, the broader voice certainly has a lot of truth to it; web2 old schoolers are still trying to bring their gatekeeper models, personas, opinions and influence into the new world, but, it’s just…old… like, really old… and boring.
Thanks for keeping it real Robness Cumba #TRASHARTLOVE
Silly Fails and Trolling

The silly fail is for those that aren’t on Polygon yet 😅. Congratulations to the Matic/Polygon team! This is huge reinforcement for the entire Layer 2 space and also Ethereum scaling as a whole. In fact, Polygon could even be considered as Ethereum’s ace up the sleeve— it’s definitely more than a temp fix. You can read more about Polygon in DIGIFIZZY Issue #1 here !
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!
Join our Community!

Discord: https://discord.gg/DKbSqRGtKv

Telegram: https://t.me/digitalaxTG

Top سؤال من ال اسبوع
ازاي is DIGITALAX expanding و reinforcing its المجتمع?

ال DIGITALAX النظام is made up من designers, creators, artists, modders, developers, technologists, web3/crypto enthusiasts, و other metaversal dwellers. Our undertaking is bigger than any individual member, ال collective alignment من ال المجتمع لـ ال greater pursuit من building open web3 native ديجيتال فاشون و metaverse ready infrastructure is at ال heart من this project.

As we continue الى scale up, further advance و build out more parts من our operating system, ال على-ramps و access channels that we are able الى support و establish too increases. و, this is where it gets exciting. We are progressively decentralising our entire النظام overtime, where eventually each المجتمع member will have an active و tangible stake في not only ال direction و حوكمة من ال project, but, even more than that, have ال ability الى spin up personal decentralised realms that can bring themselves direct value و also contribute back الى ال broader النظام— a symbiotic give و take.

As an immediate next step towards this, we have started reinforcing more من our designer النظام through our Fractional Garment Ownership standard و growing out our على-chain open source 1155 libraries من materials, patterns و textures. There is much الى come من this و some really exciting big announcements being released soon! If you are a designer, creator, artist… anyone مع a desire الى enter ال metaverse, و you align مع our mission, then please reach out so we can get you onboarded! You can also read more here.

Unlike many projects, both في crypto و especially web2, DIGITALAX is not building لـ an exit. We are here لـ ال long haul. و, putting aside ال tremendous progress we have made so far, there is still much more progress الى be made… we can’t wait! Well… more accurately… we won’t wait!
Most الاسئلة المتكررة
When is ال PODE V2 release?

PODE V2, و any تحديثات surrounding it, will be announced across all DIGITALAX official channels. Our priority is الى deliver a high quality set من experiences, within a broader framework that can grow sustainably throughout ال lifetime من ال المجتمع, created entirely في house, developed properly مع ال time و resources that it takes, و delivering recurring value لـ those who choose actively الى participate في a healthy النظام. PODE V2 is an exit path, where none previously existed, في direct response الى those who don’t align مع this roadmap و have called لـ a way out. We take our treasury allocation و management seriously و are making sure that all resources put في الى this PODE V2 initiative, as outlined here , deliver lucrativeness الى those that align— في order الى ensure this, we are allocating ال time و resources that it takes.
Top Controversies في ال Industry

I must admit, it has been both enlightening و also incredibly entertaining following ROBNESS’s #FUCKPUNKS insurgency. و, yes, some tweets are funny trolls riddled مع sarcasm, but, ال broader voice certainly has a lot من truth الى it; web2 old schoolers are still trying الى bring their gatekeeper models, personas, opinions و influence into ال جديد world, but, it’s just…old… like, really old… و boring.
Thanks لـ keeping it real Robness Cumba #TRASHARTLOVE
Silly Fails و Trolling

ال silly fail is لـ those that aren’t على Polygon yet 😅. Congratulations الى ال Matic/Polygon team! This is huge reinforcement لـ ال entire Layer 2 space و also Ethereum scaling as a whole. في fact, Polygon could even be considered as Ethereum’s ace up ال sleeve— it’s definitely more than a temp fix. You can read more about Polygon في DIGIFIZZY Issue #1 here !
If you would like a سؤال answered or contribute content الى next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server في #FUD-FAQ channel!
